ModMetaData.name: Auto Harvest Wild Plants
ModMetaData.author: jayobie
ModMetaData.description: Automates your colony's foraging and logging. Place an Auto-Harvest Center to automatically mark mature wild plants, ambrosia, berries, and generic trees for harvesting. Features a custom UI tab to individually toggle plant types, adjust gathering radii up to map-wide, and safely ignores special trees like Anima and Gauranlen. Git Hub: https://github.com/jayobie/AutoHarvestWildPlants
